# GitHub Hands-on Training

Master GitHub Enterprise Server (GHES) from production deployment to CI/CD automation. This hands-on training covers installing and administering GHES, building CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, migrating repositories and teams onto GHES, and packaging that expertise into a profitable freelance service.

💵 $250
⏱ 20 Hours
📅 2 Weeks
🎯 Guru · Freelancer · Upwork

Prefer to skip the training and have it done for you? [**Hire us for GitHub Support**](/linux-ai-services/github-services/) instead.

## What Is GitHub Hands-on Training?

GitHub Hands-on Training is School of Freelancing's instructor-led program covering GitHub Enterprise Server (GHES) — GitHub's self-hosted platform that enterprises deploy on their own infrastructure. The training teaches developers, sysadmins, and DevOps-minded freelancers who are already comfortable with Git and GitHub day-to-day how to deploy and administer GHES in production, build CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, and migrate repositories and teams onto GHES, then package that expertise into a paid freelance service.

## Key Takeaways

- **Format:** Online, instructor-led, hands-on training
- **Duration:** 20 hours over 2 weeks
- **Price:** $250 USD, paid in full before enrollment
- **Covers:** GHES production deployment and administration, CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, repository/team migration onto GHES, backups, upgrades, and high-availability configuration
- **Best for:** Developers, sysadmins, and DevOps-minded freelancers already comfortable with Git and GitHub who want to offer GHES administration and CI/CD as a freelance service

## Participation Requirements

- **[DigitalOcean:](https://try.digitalocean.com/freetrialoffer/)** Ubuntu Linux Server (24.04 or 26.04 LTS recommended).
- **Domain:** Any domain or sub domain will work.
- **Freelance Marketplace:** Verified Upwork · Guru · Freelancer Account.
- **Land Direct Clients:** From Linkedin and YouTube Account.
- **Rigorous:** Need to have patience and concentration during all training sessions.

## Connectivity

- **Portable messaging devices for 24/7 client communication.**
- **Reliable fiber-optic internet access for uninterruptible training sessions.**

## What You'll Learn

- Deploying and administering GitHub Enterprise Server (GHES) in production
- Designing CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, workflows, and self-hosted runners
- Migrating repositories, teams, and permissions onto GitHub Enterprise Server
- Managing backups, upgrades, and high-availability configuration for GHES
- Packaging GHES administration and CI/CD setup into a freelance service offering

## Who This Is For

This training suits developers, sysadmins, and DevOps-minded freelancers who can commit to 20 hours of hands-on, instructor-led training over 5 days, and who meet the
[system & participation requirements](/contact-us/) (Ubuntu Desktop 24.04/26.04 LTS PC, reliable fiber-optic internet, and a valid government-issued ID).
